construction.title: 52 Internal forces in a beam - line load

expression.label: text3
expression.exp: "q = " + F_{d} + "kN / m (" + (F_{d} / scaleForceDiagram) + " units) L = " + beam + " m (" + beam + " units) R = q * L = " + ((F_{d} * beam)) + "kN (" + ((F_{d} * beam / scaleForceDiagram)) + " units)"
